ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 has been shipped!
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon India! Your order #1234567890 has been dispatched and will arrive at your address within 3-5 business days.

Order details:
1 x 'Echo Dot (4th Gen)' – ₹3,500

Estimated delivery: 15 Apr 2026

If you have any questions, contact Amazon customer support at <URL> or call 1800-123-456.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best Regards,
Amazon India

spam.subject: Congratulations! You have been selected for a full scholarship at XYZ University
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for a fully-funded scholarship of ₹5,00,000 at the prestigious XYZ University in partnership with the Ministry of Education. As per the regulations, a processing fee of ₹25,000 is required to confirm your admission. Please complete the payment within 48 hours to secure your place. Failure to pay will result in cancellation.

Send your bank details: account number, IFSC, and a copy of your PAN card to <URL> or reply to this email. Use the code SCH-2026. If you do not comply, your scholarship offer will be revoked.

Regards,
Dr. R. Sharma
Office of Scholarship Affairs
